name: pi-go-review
description_en: Review Go code changes against the '100 Go Mistakes and How to Avoid Them' checklist (https://100go.co/). Registers a go_review tool that analyzes git diffs against all 101 common Go mistakes.
description_zh: 根据《100 Go Mistakes and How to Avoid Them》清单审查 Go 代码更改（https://100go.co/）。注册一个 go_review 工具，分析 git diff 与所有 101 个常见 Go 错误
